Sysco fought more than year gain government approval transaction, which antitrust regulators said would hurt competition lead higher prices. Investors have responded with relief deal's demise, reflecting concerns about company undertaking ambitious merger. Sysco shares rose percent transaction halted U.S. District Judge Amit Mehta, stock climbed again Monday morning after merger withdrawn.

arguments before Mehta May, sides clashed over scope market which companies compete. Sysco Foods argued that commission relying "tortured" analysis, ignoring variety distribution channels available customers.
